title: code generated by `write_cxxrtl` fails to compile with big arguments to `$write`

features.name: write_system_task_with_wide_expression
features.description: Code should include a $write system task with an expression argument where the expression result width exceeds 32 bits

features.name: unsigned_cast_on_wide_signal
features.description: Code should include a $unsigned() cast applied to a signal with bit width greater than 32 bits
